mapper.sql: id, title, section, question_type, context_description, script_excerpt, questions, answers, tips, difficulty, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT li.*, sr.status AS study_status FROM ielts_listening_items li LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'LISTENING' AND sr.content_id = li.id
ORDER BY li.section, li.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_listening_items li LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'LISTENING' AND sr.content_id = li.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_listening_items (id, title, section, question_type, context_description, script_excerpt, questions, answers, tips, difficulty, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{title}, #{section}, #{questionType}, #{contextDescription}, #{scriptExcerpt}, #{questions}, #{answers}, #{tips}, #{difficulty}, #{topicTags}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_listening_items SET title = #{title}, section = #{section}, question_type = #{questionType}, context_description = #{contextDescription}, script_excerpt = #{scriptExcerpt}, questions = #{questions}, answers = #{answers}, tips = #{tips}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, topic_tags = #{topicTags}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_listening_items (id, title, section, question_type, context_description, script_excerpt, questions, answers, tips, difficulty, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{i.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{i.title}, #{i.section}, #{i.questionType}, #{i.contextDescription}, #{i.scriptExcerpt}, #{i.questions}, #{i.answers}, #{i.tips}, #{i.difficulty}, #{i.topicTags}, #{i.createdAt}, #{i.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT li.* FROM ielts_listening_items li WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_study_records sr WHERE sr.content_type = 'LISTENING' AND sr.content_id = li.id ) ORDER BY li.difficulty, li.id LIMIT #{limit}
